name: ChemMatEnv-paper
description: A cross-platform materials/chemistry/environment top-journal manuscript skill: story-package design, target-journal requirements, per-section playbook drafting, citation search, live literature expression audit + diction calibration, anti-AI style cleanup + zh-to-EN repair, logic repair + reverse outlining, failure-mode diagnosis, LaTeX layout fixes, and multi-round simulated review. Works with ZCode, Claude Code, Codex CLI, OpenCode, Hermes, and any tool following the Agent Skills open standard.
